data.title: Pete Rose 21-Card Lot 1981-1987 Topps Fleer Donruss Leaf Player Collection
data.description:
Twenty-one Pete Rose cards from his 1980s run with the Phillies and back with the Reds, pulled from four different manufacturers. If you're working on a Pete Rose player collection and need to fill in that junk wax era stretch, this lot covers a lot of ground in one shot.

Cards | 21 total
Years | 1981-1987
Brands | Topps, Fleer, Donruss, Leaf
Condition | Good overall, typical junk wax handling
Duplicates | Mixed, some possible

All my listings ship with free shipping for your ease, none of this $30 shipping on a 1 pound item. I price my listings fairly but please feel free to make an offer.

Sold As Is.
data.condition_field: 21 cards, Good condition overall. Mix of Topps, Fleer, Donruss, and Leaf from 1981-1987. Typical handling for the era — no major damage noted. Some duplicates possible.
